title: Tsubu★Doll
synopsis: With the stage set for 16 girls in Sagamihara, they will fulfill their dreams in a local idol story. Rather than focusing on girls aiming to become top idol, the story will show realistic girls that could exist anywhere as they devote their energy towards idol activities in Sagamihara. The Tsubu Doll members are "local idols" living in Sagamihara instead of regular idols.

title: Utakata:Overdrive
titleNative: ウタカタ・オーバードライブ
synopsis: The story takes place in the fantasy world of Planet Note. Humans, who can no longer sing, pair up with members of a tribe of non-humans that can sing. These are the sound users "Otokata" and the singers "Utakata." Together they use the sounds and songs as weapons in competition. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: The Satellite Girl and Milk Cow
titleEnglish: The Satellite Girl and Milk Cow
synonyms: La chica satélite y el chico vaca
synopsis: An adventure by Il-ho the Satellite Girl and a shy cow to save the world from a black monster. "The Satellite Girl and Milk Cow" is a debuting animation by Jang Hyeong-yoon who is also known as the 'genius director' for his achievements in the omnibus movie "Indie Anibox: Selma's Protein Coffee" and others. (Source: HanCinema)

title: XPICE
synopsis: Find your spice. Live true to you. A collaboration between all-female rock band SCANDAL x the company XFLAG, an original animated short: XPICE —a tale of heroes fighting to protect their city, and how they grow along the way. It's got a dash of courage, a pinch of teamwork, and a whole lot of heart. The short is directed by Tsubasa Nakai set to the song Spice by SCANDAL. Kokyo, a city brimming with people from all walks of life, and the prime target of the mysterious group Zerogram. But Red Pepper and Wasabi—a duo from the superhero league XPICE—aren't going to stand idly by. Red Pepper's fiery punches deal with the baddies while Wasabi's healing touch cares for the wounded. Things seem to be going well on the surface. Deep down, however, Wasabi can't help but feel like there's more to being a hero. One faithful day, the emergency alert blares—Red Pepper's in trouble! Though unsure of their chances, seeing a teammate in danger helps Wasabi find the courage to rise to the occasion. (Sou

title: Aikatsu! Memorial Stage: Kagayaki no Unit Cup
titleRomaji: Aikatsu! Memorial Stage: Kagayaki no Unit Cup
titleNative: アイカツ！メモリアルステージ ～輝きのユニットカップ～
synopsis: Compilation film of Aikatsu! 's 3rd Season's "Aikatsu Restaurant" episode (ep. 140), followed by the "Unit Cup" arc (eps. 136-138), also featuring new segments with commentary from Akari, Madoka, Juri and Sumire. A part of the 10th anniversary celebrations of the Akari Generation . After an announcement that a "Unit Cup" will be held at Starlight Academy's middle school, the eight performing two-member units are as motivated as they can be. This time, the event's broadcast will also feature a special corner where the idols report on each other's true faces behind the scenes. Is it time for the idols to clash with each other more passionately than ever?! The curtain rises on the Unit Cup right here and now! (Source: Official Website, translated)

title: Googuri Googuri
titleNative: ぐーぐりぃ ぐーぐりぃ
synopsis: "Googuri Googuri" - a made up word, a secret word, shared by a girl and her grandfather. For the girl, her grandfather is at times like a mountain, at other times like a tree, or an ocean; a warm and comfortable place. Her thoughts take wing into her endless imagination. The things we have seen, smelled, thought, and everything we have experienced, extending and expanding within the infinite expanse inside ourselves. Graduate Work 2010, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: SLIDE
synopsis: Based on the figure skater Mao Asada. On July 10th, Tekken posted the full version of the video on his official YouTube channel. The story took 2,890 hand drawn sheets. Tekken originally made a short version back in 2015 but when Mao Asada announced her retirement on April 10, 2017--he decided to expand upon it by creating 5 minutes worth of additional content.
